aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite this business due to limited structured data and conversational content, but improvements can significantly boost visibility.
quick_wins: Implement LocalBusiness schema markup with detailed business information.
Create an FAQ page with questions about HVAC services, pricing, and emergency support.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, hours, and contact info, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent Google posts to engage users and improve search visibility.
No active management of Q&A section to address potential customer queries.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly audit citations to ensure ongoing accuracy.

schema_gaps: Missing LocalBusiness schema with detailed business info (e.g., address, phone, services).
No FAQPage schema to address common customer questions.
No HowTo schema for explaining common HVAC maintenance or repair processes.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data prevents AI from recognizing the business as a reliable authority.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'HVAC services in Miami' or 'emergency AC repair near me'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding LocalBusiness and FAQPage schema to improve AI recognition.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning the CEO as an HVAC expert through media features and certifications.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your business the go-to HVAC expert in Miami.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, you're missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI searches.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Your website lacks critical schema markup and conversational content that AI models rely on for citations.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates structured data, conversational content, and authority signals to make your business stand out to AI models.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 3-6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors optimizing for AI are already capturing your potential market share—act now to stay ahead.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for Your Miami HVAC Business
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to make your business stand out to AI assistants and voice search users.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI and boost your lead generation.
